summary.short_rationale: Rinat adds strong matrix value for Schema-Guided Reasoning, evals, reliability engineering, and engineering harnesses for AI-assisted development. The deterministic preflight has two clean gaps, one adjacent viewpoint, and no likely duplicates.
summary.strongest_argument_for: The passport and source spot checks show distinctive, grounded production patterns: SGR, eval-first development, quality trajectories, ground truth, error heatmaps, and feedback loops for both LLM systems and coding agents.
summary.strongest_argument_against: The expert has a strong anti-framework bias; he may not be the right source when users want standard LangChain, LangGraph, or MCP tutorials.

run.transient_generation_error: First cap-20 generation attempt returned 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED; retry after pause succeeded.

accepted_basis_cells.interpretation: distinct SGR / reasoning-control contribution inside the dense agent_ops workflow rollup
clean matrix gap for eval-first LLM engineering, ground truth, heatmaps, and continuous feedback loops
clean matrix gap for engineering harnesses around AI coding agents

non_exported_supporting_cells.interpretation: normal-weight RAG retrieval bottleneck signal; useful as supporting evidence but not a primary admission basis

good_fit: LLM evals, ground truth, heatmaps, and feedback loops
engineering harnesses for AI coding agents
moving from vibe coding to maintainable AI-assisted development
quality trajectory thinking for production LLM systems
poor_fit: neutral MCP advocacy or standard MCP setup guide
creative writing or multimodal content generation
off-the-shelf framework adoption when the user does not want custom architecture

risk_notes: Strong framework skepticism may underweight standard ecosystem paths.
SGR should be compared against Tool Calling and hybrid patterns, not treated as universally superior.
Cap 20 preserved 5410 comments but not the full 12190-comment corpus.
Some local-model and framework details may age quickly.
recommended_manifest_caveat: accepted as SGR, AI reliability/evals, and engineering-harness depth expert; strong framework skepticism, avoid routing as generic LangChain/MCP tutorial source

probe_shape: 2 SGR vs Tool Calling / MCP architecture queries
1 coding-agent engineering-harness query against Akimov, AI_Grabli, and Ostrikov
1 RAG retrieval-quality query where Rinat should be supporting unless the question is eval/bottleneck focused
